data.title: Traders caution $123K peak for Bitcoin; bearish signs hint at potential drop to $92,000 similar to past.
data.description: A bearish divergence in Bitcoin is hinting at a potential price correction to around $92,000, which mirrors the drops observed in previous years such as 2020 and 2024.

data.title: Leatt Corp will release Q2 2025 results on conference call and webcast. Leader in protective gear for sports.
data.description: In Cape Town, South Africa, on August 1, 2025, the renowned company Leatt Corporation, known for producing head-to-toe protective gear for various sports, especially extreme and high-velocity ones, revealed its intention to unveil its financial results. The corporation, listed as OTCQB: LEAT, continues to be a dominant player in the market with its innovative range of protective equipment catering to diverse sporting needs.

data.title: Global K-12 arts and crafts market at $4B in 2024 to reach $4.4B by 2030, growing at 1.8% CAGR. Report provides insights on market trends and drivers.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "K-12 Arts and Crafts Material - Global Strategic Business Report" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for K-12 Arts and Crafts Material was valued at approximately US$4.0 Billion in 2024, with projections indicating it will reach around US$4.4 Billion by 2030. The market is anticipated to grow at a CAGR of 1.8% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and future forecasts to assist businesses in making well-informed decisions.

data.title: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (NYSE: LYB) reports Q2 2025 earnings of 62 cents per share, missing estimates, with revenue at $7.66 billion. Adjusted EBITDA increases to $715 million from $576 million in the prior quarter. The company is deferring projects and optimizing portfolio due to cyclical downturn. North America operations benefit from maintenance completion at Channelview complex, while Europe operations see improved margins due to lower feedstock costs.
data.description: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (NYSE: LYB) reported mixed Q2 2025 financial results. Adjusted earnings were 62 cents per share, missing estimates of 89 cents. Sales were $7.66 billion, beating the estimated $7.60 billion, but down 11.7% YoY. Reported diluted EPS was 34 cents due to one-time charges. Adjusted EBITDA increased to $715 million from $576 million in the previous quarter. Maintenance completion at the Channelview complex boosted North America performance, while lower feedstock costs improved margins in Europe. Intermediate Chemicals saw improved profitability due to stronger styrene margins. The company is shifting towards circular, renewable growth, including selling European assets. More details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bloom Nutrition launches fall-themed Crisp Apple Sparkling Energy flavor, available first at Target. Fast-growing wellness brand.
data.description: The rapidly growing wellness company, Bloom Nutrition, based in Austin, Texas, launched a new fall-themed Crisp Apple Sparkling Energy flavor on August 1, 2025. This product is exclusively released at Target stores. Known for their viral success, Bloom Nutrition is making their mark with this debut special flavor as part of their energy drink line.
July 2025 update on share capital and voting rights, important figures included.

data.title: Global Surgical Sutures Market expected to reach US$6.65 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 6.5%, up from US$4.84 billion in 2025.
data.description: In August 2025 in Delray Beach, Florida, the worldwide Surgical Sutures Market saw significant growth, increasing from US$4.56 billion in 2024 to US$4.84 billion in 2025. Projections indicate a steady compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.5% from 2025 to 2030. It is anticipated that by the end of this period, the market will reach a value of US$6.65 billion.

data.title: Angela D'Orazio joins Compass Box as Creative Director of Whiskymaking, known for her work at Mackmyra.
data.description: Renowned former Master Blender and Chief Nose Officer of Mackmyra, Angela D'Orazio, has joined Compass Box Scotch Whisky as the Creative Director of Whiskymaking. This exciting appointment is set to bring a wealth of experience to the innovative blending house. The news was officially announced on August 1st, 2025, marking a significant transition for both D'Orazio and Compass Box. This move is expected to have a major impact on the future direction and offerings of Compass Box, with experts predicting a significant boost in their reputation and sales.

data.title: Kroger Health provides back-to-school health tips for families to ensure a healthy school year.
data.description: In Cincinnati on August 1, 2025, Kroger Health, the healthcare arm of The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), is providing guidance for families gearing up for the back-to-school season. The company aims to assist families with staying healthy as the academic year approaches.

data.title: Duckhorn Portfolio appoints Enrique Morgan as Chief Sales Officer, effective Aug 11, 2025, succeeding Pete Przybylinski.
data.description: St. HELENA, Calif.-- Duckhorn Portfolio, the leading luxury wine company in North America, revealed the appointment of Enrique Morgan as the new Executive Vice President and Chief Sales Officer starting from August 11, 2025. Morgan takes over from Pete Przybylinski, who held the position previously and will now serve as an external advisor to CEO Robert Hanson. With over 24 years of expertise in the Wine and Spirits sector, Morgan's extensive experience positions him as an ideal candidate for the role.
Fed's Bostic: I still am not hearing from businesses that they're on the verge of letting go a lot of people.

data.title: Gray Media to buy Block Communications' TV stations for $80 million, enhancing presence in Midwest markets.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Gray Media, Inc. announced the acquisition of Block Communications, Inc.'s television stations for $80 million. The deal aims to bolster Gray's Midwest influence through the establishment of a Big Four duopoly in one market. Additionally, Gray will gain top-performing local news stations in two other midwestern markets. This move is projected to enhance Gray's existing strong local stations in neighboring markets, expanding its overall reach and impact in the region.
